title: Aurora, 33534, Palm Pals Brodie Collie Dog, 5In, Soft Toy, Black & White
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable dog soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Brodie Collie Dog cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: This cute Brodie Collie Dog fits into the palm of your hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly. His body is a soft black & white plush material. This is a super cute playful Collie Dog soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Collie Dog. Collie Dog is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
